name: Lovable App Builder Reference
description: A playful AI app-builder system inspired by Lovable public pages, with chat-first creation, soft gradient accents, template galleries, builder metrics, and simple idea-to-ship flows.

en.name: Lovable App Builder Reference
en.description: A playful AI app-builder system inspired by Lovable public pages, with chat-first creation, soft gradient accents, template galleries, builder metrics, and simple idea-to-ship flows.

zh-CN.name: Lovable 应用构建器参考
zh-CN.description: 受 Lovable 公开页面启发的轻快 AI 应用构建器系统，包含聊天优先创建、柔和渐变强调、模板画廊、构建指标和从想法到发布的简化流程。
